headline: Shares of homebuilding and housing-related companies are trading higher amid broader market strength after the U.S. and Iran reached a ceasefire deal, with sentiment lifted by President Trump's 15-point Iran conflict-resolution plan.
summary: Shares of homebuilding and housing-related companies are trading higher amid broader market strength after the U.S. and Iran reached a ceasefire deal, with sentiment lifted by President Trump's 15-point Iran conflict-resolution plan.

headline: Lennox Schedules First Quarter Results
summary: Lennox (NYSE: LII), a leader in energy-efficient building and home comfort solutions, will report first quarter 2026 financial results before the market opens on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. An earnings conference call and webcast are scheduled for the same day at 8:30 a.m. Central Time. CEO Alok Maskara and CFO Michael Quenzer will provide a summary of the company's financial results and outlook, followed by a question-and-answer session.

headline: Lennox International Inc (NYSE:LII) Passes the Caviar Cruise Quality Investing Screen
summary: Lennox International (LII) exemplifies quality investing with high profitability, strong cash flow, and durable competitive advantages in the HVAC market.
